name: Peb Building Manufacturers
description:
SAMAN is a PEB building manufacturer that fabricates your steel structure in-house and erects it on your site — we are the firm that makes the building and the crew that stands it up, not a trader that buys components in and re-labels them. The configured building on this page is a 60 × 30 × 20 ft pre-engineered steel structure on a mild steel frame with a PUF sandwich-panel envelope, fabricated and erected for ₹19,35,000 inclusive of all taxes. Every primary and secondary member is cut, welded, and finished at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida, then transported and erected by our own team. When you shortlist PEB building manufacturers, you are really deciding one thing — whether the company that makes your steel also takes responsibility for putting it up. This page answers that, then points you to the right next step.

Does a PEB building manufacturer also erect the building?

Not all of them. Many PEB manufacturers fabricate the steel and ship it, leaving erection to your own crew or a local contractor. SAMAN does both — we manufacture the frame and cladding in-house and erect the finished building with our own team, so one company is accountable from steel to standing structure.

SAMAN's own crew erecting the steel frame on site — the same company that fabricated it stands it up.

This matters because the join between fabrication and erection is where most problems start. When the same peb manufacturers who cut and welded your frame also bolt it together on site, the members are matched before they leave the plant, and any site adjustment is handled by the people who built them — not argued between two contractors who each blame the other.

How the way a PEB is manufactured decides what it costs

Fabricated steel staged before dispatch — total tonnage here is the biggest single driver of the price.

The price of a pre-engineered building is set in the factory, not on site. The single biggest lever is steel tonnage — the total weight of structural steel your design calls for. A wider clear span or a higher eaves height needs heavier primary and secondary members, and steel is sold by weight, so tonnage moves the quote more than any other variable. A manufacturer who designs efficiently — sizing each member to the load it actually carries instead of over-specifying to play safe — delivers the same building for less steel, and a lower price.

Primary steel members fabricated and welded in-house — the stage where build quality and price are set.

Fabrication quality is the second lever, and it shows up later. Steel cut on a CNC line to the structural programme, welded at load-bearing joints under inspection, and shot-blasted before priming costs more to produce than steel cut by hand in an open yard — but it bolts together accurately on site, resists corrosion longer, and carries a mill test certificate tracing every primary member to its steel heat. That traceability is what an industrial buyer or auditor checks. The steel grades, bolt classes, and clear spans behind a SAMAN structure are set out on our PEB steel structure page. Because we run in-house fabrication at two plants, we control both levers — we size the steel to your real loads, and we stand behind the fabrication record.

Inside the 60 × 30 × 20 ft PEB SAMAN manufactures for ₹19,35,000

The configuration on this page is a 60 × 30 × 20 ft pre-engineered building — 1,800 sq ft of floor on a mild steel portal frame, clad in PUF sandwich panel for the roof and walls, fabricated and erected for ₹19,35,000 inclusive of all taxes. As PEB building manufacturers in Bangalore with a second plant in Greater Noida, we fabricate the complete structure in-house: primary portal frames, secondary purlins and girts, the panel envelope, and all fasteners cut and matched to the same drawing before dispatch.

The finished 60 × 30 × 20 ft building handed over on a working industrial site.

What the price covers: structural design to IS code, in-house fabrication of the frame and cladding, transport to your site, erection by our own crew, and the documentation your records need — as-built drawings, a mill test certificate for the primary steel, and an IS-compliance summary. For a structure this size, expect roughly three weeks of fabrication, a few days in transit, and ten to fourteen days of erection on site. What moves the figure on a different size is covered area, clear span, eaves height, roofing and wall grade, any crane or mezzanine provision, and distance from the nearer plant. We confirm all of these at the quote stage, so the number you receive is a building — not an estimate.

Inside the finished building — a 30 ft column-free clear span ready for the buyer's fit-out.

Built and erected by SAMAN, or shipped for your own crew — choosing the right route

Three buyers search for PEB building manufacturers, and they need three different things.

If you want the maker to fabricate the steel and erect the finished building for you — the route this page describes — SAMAN manufactures and stands up the structure as a single accountable peb company.

If you already have your own erection team or a local contractor and only need the fabricated steel delivered, that is a component-supply order, not a build. For that, see our pre-engineered building manufacturing page, where the structure is fabricated and shipped for your crew to erect.

If you want the building supplied and erected but without the full construction scope — no civil work or statutory approvals — our supplied-and-erected PEB route covers exactly that middle ground.

And if your project needs everything managed under one contract — ground survey, civil work, building approvals, erection, and a single handover — that is a turnkey project, not a manufacturing order. Our turnkey PEB construction service takes responsibility end to end.

PEB Building Manufacturers — FAQs

Do you only fabricate the PEB, or do you erect it on site as well?

Both. The price on this page includes erection by SAMAN's own crew. You provide a level, accessible plot with the foundation cast to our drawing; we fabricate the structure in-house and stand it up. If you prefer to erect with your own team, we can fabricate and ship the components instead.

Where does SAMAN manufacture, and which plant will build my PEB?

We fabricate at two plants — Bangalore (Gopasandra) and Greater Noida. The plant nearer your site fabricates and dispatches your structure, which keeps freight shorter; distance affects transport cost and lead time, both fixed at the quote stage, not whether we can supply you.

What documentation do you provide as the manufacturer?

Each build is handed over with as-built structural drawings, a mill test certificate tracing the primary steel to its heat, an IS-compliance summary, and the erection completion record — the documents an industrial buyer or building-approval authority asks for.

Can you manufacture a PEB to a non-standard size or clear span?

Yes. The 60 × 30 × 20 ft unit on this page is one configuration — we design and fabricate to your covered area, clear span, and eaves height, from small structures up to large multi-bay buildings. Send your dimensions and intended use, and we quote the steel and finish to match.

Get a PEB Manufacturing Quote

Send your size and site location for a same-day price and lead-time estimate.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
